checks.detail: ONESIGNAL_APP_ID and ONESIGNAL_API_KEY are present.
OneSignal API rejected credentials (HTTP 403). Verify REST API key for this app.
checks.recovery: Verify API key scopes and app id.

checks.detail: OneSignal delivery webhooks are optional; in-app notifications use DB idempotency keys.
checks.recovery: Configure OneSignal webhooks if you need delivery receipts beyond in-app status.

checks.detail: Provider send failures return status=failed with errorMessage; no silent swallow in onesignal-provider.
Duplicate notification inserts catch unique idempotency violations and return the existing row.
PAYMENT_PROVIDER=noop. Stripe is not active.
checks.recovery: Set PAYMENT_PROVIDER=stripe and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_… for sandbox certification.

checks.detail: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY missing.
checks.recovery: Add a Stripe test secret key (sk_test_…) for sandbox certification.

checks.detail: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET missing — sandbox may accept simulate headers.
checks.recovery: Add the Stripe CLI / dashboard webhook signing secret.

checks.detail: createCustomer → noop-cus-00000000
Webhook parse returned 1 event(s).
Failed intents map to failed status with failureMessage; webhook duplicates short-circuit via integrations_webhook_events.
Duplicate webhook event ids are ignored; simulate endpoint blocked in production unless STRIPE_ALLOW_SIMULATE=true.
SIGNATURE_PROVIDER=noop. Dropbox Sign is not active.
checks.recovery: Set SIGNATURE_PROVIDER=dropbox_sign with a sandbox API key.

checks.detail: DROPBOX_SIGN_API_KEY missing.
checks.recovery: Add a Dropbox Sign test API key for sandbox certification.

checks.detail: Signature provider id=noop resolved (createEnvelope available).
Webhook parse returned 1 event(s).
Webhook secret missing — simulate header accepted in sandbox.
checks.recovery: Configure DROPBOX_SIGN_WEBHOOK_SECRET from the Dropbox Sign app.

checks.detail: Signature webhooks verify signatures; failures audit to signature_audit_events; duplicates via integrations_webhook_events.
Packages can be resent/canceled through domain APIs; simulate blocked in production without ALLOW_SIMULATE.
SCREENING_PROVIDER=noop. Checkr is not active.
checks.recovery: Set SCREENING_PROVIDER=checkr with Checkr sandbox credentials.

checks.detail: CHECKR_API_KEY missing — local sandbox simulation still available.
checks.recovery: Add Checkr sandbox API key for live network certification.

checks.detail: CHECKR_WEBHOOK_SECRET missing — webhook verification may be relaxed in sandbox.
checks.recovery: Add the Checkr webhook secret before production.

checks.detail: Network failures fall back to sandbox simulation unless CHECKR_REQUIRE_LIVE=true; webhook duplicates ignored.
Screening cases remain recoverable via domain status + webhook redelivery.
Resend is roadmap-only (INT-303). Transactional email is not a production dependency yet.
checks.recovery: Do not block launch on Resend until email provider is implemented.

checks.detail: Twilio SMS is roadmap-only (INT-302). SMS preferences are non-delivering placeholders.
checks.recovery: Do not treat SMS as production-ready until Twilio is implemented.

checks.detail: Supabase URL and anon key present.
Service role available for server-side signed URLs.
Media module uses signed upload/read URLs against media-private bucket (API-002A).
Media intent API returns structured apiError codes; processor failures write media_audit_events.
Failed uploads can be retried via new intent; orphan GC remains a known hardening follow-up.
Auth client credentials present.
Session handled via @supabase/ssr + middleware redirects to /login for protected routes.
getUser() used on API routes; unauthenticated requests return UNAUTHENTICATED human messages.
Expired JWT humanized to session-expired copy; unauthorized routes redirect to /unauthorized.
Users recover by signing in again; invitation accept flow re-links membership.

Index organization_id + status + updated_at. (not measured in this run — budget documented for QA perf probes.)

Debounce client queries; cap result sets. (not measured in this run — budget documented for QA perf probes.)

Signed URL creation should stay under 1s. (not measured in this run — budget documented for QA perf probes.)
